agents.config:
dpdk_args = ""
dpdk_inputs = ["0000:00:1f.6"]
dpdk_outputs = ["0000:00:1f.6"]
src_mac = "00:00:00:00:00:00"
dst_mac = "00:00:00:00:00:00"
dump_dir = "/opt/clumit/var/sensor"
log_path = "/opt/clumit/log/sensor.log"
giganto_ingest_srv_addr = "10.0.0.2:38370"
giganto_name = "beta-store"
pcap_max_size = 1000
protocols = ["http", "ssh"]
http_ports = [80]
https_ports = [443]
ssh_ports = [22]
ftp_ports = [21]
dump_items = ["pcap"]
dump_http_content_types = ["pdf"]

externalServices.draft:
ingest_srv_addr = "127.0.0.1:48370"
publish_srv_addr = "127.0.0.1:48371"
graphql_srv_addr = "127.0.0.1:9444"
retention = "14d"
data_dir = "/srv/giganto/data-next"
export_dir = "/srv/giganto/export-next"
max_open_files = 8192
max_mb_of_level_base = 1024
num_of_thread = 16
max_subcompactions = 4
ack_transmission = 8
